# Icon Computers
Hamilton's local computer repair, custom PC optimization, and data recovery shop.

## Core Details
- Location: 90 Centennial Pkwy N, Hamilton, ON
- Contact: (289) 796-2340
- Lead Technician: Chris
- Experience: 25 years of expert bench diagnostics.

## Services Provided
- In-Store Repairs: Component-level diagnostics, soldering, micro-soldering, physical hardware replacements.
- On-Site Tech: Business networking setups, physical hardware installs, local WiFi optimizations.
- Remote Assistance: Virus removals, software optimization, software troubleshooting.
- Custom PC Builds: The Builder's Workshop. An exclusive, 1-on-1 custom gaming PC assembly class for consumers.
- Community Help: Free scam safety advice (Anti-AnyDesk/TeamViewer protection, gift card trap intervention).
